controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks
- Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from the date of issue of this directions
controls.control_description: These directions shall come into effect from the date of issue of this Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from the date of issue of this directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') as defined under clause (ja) of s
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') as defined under
clause (ja) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') as defined under clause (ja) of s

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'administrative office' or 'controlling office' means a corporate, regional, zonal, or any other office
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Administrative Office' or 'Controlling Office' means a corporate, regional, zonal,
or any other office, by whatsoever name called, that exercises control or oversight
functions on units / Banking Outlets / Offices falling under its jurisdiction and
undertakes internal administrative functions including oversight of bank's own
staff and carries out no banking or business transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'administrative office' or 'controlling office' means a corporate, regional, zonal, or any other office

controls.control_objective: To ensure a central processing centre (cpc) or an office, by whatever name called, that exclusively attends to functions such as data processing, processing of
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Back Offices' means a Central Processing Centre (CPC) or an Office, by
whatever name called, that exclusively attends to functions such as data
processing, processing of loans, verification and processing of documents,
issuance of cheque books, demand drafts etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a central processing centre (cpc) or an office, by whatever name called, that exclusively attends to functions such as data processing, processing of

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a regular off-site and on-site monitoring of the 'banking outlet' to ensure proper supervision, 'uninterrupted service' except temporary interrup
controls.control_description:
The bank should
have a regular off-site and on-site monitoring of the 'Banking Outlet' to ensure
proper supervision, 'uninterrupted service' except temporary interruptions due to
telecom connectivity, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a regular off-site and on-site monitoring of the 'banking outlet' to ensure proper supervision, 'uninterrupted service' except temporary interrup

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place separate board-approved policies for the following: (1) opening, merging, shifting, conversion and closure of banking outlets for strict
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place separate Board-approved policies for the following:
(1) Opening, merging, shifting, conversion and closure of Banking Outlets for strict
compliance with these directions, in letter and spirit as prescribed in paragraphs
8 to 22.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place separate board-approved policies for the following: (1) opening, merging, shifting, conversion and closure of banking outlets for strict

controls.control_objective: To ensure fulfill the following responsibilities: (1) banking outlets (1) the board shall ensure regular off-site and on-site monitoring system of the 'banking
controls.control_description:
The Board of the bank shall fulfill the following responsibilities:
(1) Banking Outlets
(1) The Board shall ensure regular off-site and on-site monitoring system of the
'Banking Outlet' to ensure proper supervision, 'uninterrupted service' and
timely addressing of customer grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fulfill the following responsibilities: (1) banking outlets (1) the board shall ensure regular off-site and on-site monitoring system of the 'banking

controls.control_objective: To ensure regularly review and monitor the transactions in the banking outlets to see that banking services are being transacted in these outlets and more speci
controls.control_description:
(2) The Board shall regularly review and monitor the transactions in the Banking
Outlets to see that banking services are being transacted in these outlets and
more specifically the target customers for financial inclusion are getting the
banking facilities in unbanked rural centres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regularly review and monitor the transactions in the banking outlets to see that banking services are being transacted in these outlets and more speci

controls.control_objective: To ensure set internal targets for financial inclusion
controls.control_description: (3) The Board shall set internal targets for financial inclusion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set internal targets for financial inclusion

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the progress in this regard regularly, say on quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
Data on centre-
wise and tier-wise customer accounts and transactions (Type and number of
accounts, deposits received, advances made, remittances processed,
<image>
outstanding balances, etc.) should be captured on regular basis and the
Board shall review the progress in this regard regularly, say on quarterly
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the progress in this regard regularly, say on quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure make the above data available to rbi as and when required and called for
controls.control_description:
(4) The Board shall make the above data available to RBI as and when required
and called for.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make the above data available to rbi as and when required and called for

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the policy for engaging business correspondents (bcs)
controls.control_description:
(2) Business Correspondent Model (BC)
(1) The Board shall approve the policy for engaging Business Correspondents
(BCs).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve the policy for engaging business correspondents (bcs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine the issue of allowing bcs to handle deposit and payment transactions of various credits, remittance, overdraft and other products of bank
controls.control_description:
(2) The Board shall examine the issue of allowing BCs to handle deposit and
payment transactions of various credits, remittance, overdraft and other
products of bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine the issue of allowing bcs to handle deposit and payment transactions of various credits, remittance, overdraft and other products of bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be laid down by the board
controls.control_description:
Complaints redressal system in this regard shall also be
laid down by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be laid down by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the operations of bcs at least once every six months with a view to ensuring that requirement of prefunding of corporate bcs and bc agents shou
controls.control_description:
(3) The Board shall review the operations of BCs at least once every six months
with a view to ensuring that requirement of prefunding of Corporate BCs and
BC Agents should progressively taper down with the passage of time as
specified in paragraph 62.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the operations of bcs at least once every six months with a view to ensuring that requirement of prefunding of corporate bcs and bc agents shou

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the position of payment of remuneration of bcs and shall also lay down a system of monitoring by the top management of the bank
controls.control_description:
(4) The Board of a bank shall review the position of payment of remuneration
of BCs and shall also lay down a system of monitoring by the top
management of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the position of payment of remuneration of bcs and shall also lay down a system of monitoring by the top management of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval of rbi using the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
For opening of banking outlets (excluding BC outlets) in Tier 1 to 4 centres, a
bank shall obtain prior approval of RBI using the Pravaah portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior approval of rbi using the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description:
The application shall be considered, provided it fulfils
the following conditions:
(1) Minimum CRAR of nine percent
(2) Net NPA ratio does not exceed five percent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be cbs compliant and have in place system generated npa recognition
controls.control_description:
(5) All branches and Head offices of the RRB shall be CBS compliant and
have in place system generated NPA recognition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be cbs compliant and have in place system generated npa recognition

controls.control_objective: To ensure have general permission for opening banking outlets in rural centres i
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall have general permission for opening banking outlets in rural
centres i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have general permission for opening banking outlets in rural centres i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted, only after a bank had achieved the target of opening 25 percent of the total banking outlets in unbanked rural centres, during the previou
controls.control_description:
(1) For opening branches in tier 1 to 4 centres during the current year, the
permission for opening new branches shall be granted, only after a bank
had achieved the target of opening 25 percent of the total banking outlets in
unbanked rural centres, during the previous financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted, only after a bank had achieved the target of opening 25 percent of the total banking outlets in unbanked rural centres, during the previou

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the regional office concerned of rbi for post-facto automatic issue of the licence/s
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank opening branches in Tier 5 and 6 centres, shall approach the
Regional Office concerned of RBI for post-facto automatic issue of the
licence/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the regional office concerned of rbi for post-facto automatic issue of the licence/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed in the premises of the branch so opened for information of its customers / public to instill confidence in them that the bank branch is a
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) The licence shall be displayed in the premises of the branch so opened for
information of its customers / public to instill confidence in them that the
bank branch is authorised to conduct banking business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed in the premises of the branch so opened for information of its customers / public to instill confidence in them that the bank branch is a

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be responsible for monitoring opening / closing / shifting / merger of banking outlets of an rrb under their jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
The Regional Office concerned of RBI, through the Empowered Committee on
Regional Rural Banks, shall also be responsible for monitoring opening / closing
/ shifting / merger of banking outlets of an RRB under their jurisdiction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be responsible for monitoring opening / closing / shifting / merger of banking outlets of an rrb under their jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to open banking outlets in tier 1 to tier 4 centres
controls.control_description:
Further, if
any RRB fails to adhere to the requirement of opening 25 percent banking outlets
in a URC, in a year, such RRB shall not be permitted to open banking outlets in
Tier 1 to Tier 4 centres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to open banking outlets in tier 1 to tier 4 centres

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened in unbanked rural centres (urcs), as defined in paragraph 4(4) above
controls.control_description:
The opening of 'Banking Outlets' during a financial year will be subject to the
conditions given below:
(1) At least 25 percent of the total number of Banking Outlets opened during a
<image>
financial year shall be opened in Unbanked Rural Centres (URCs), as defined
in paragraph 4(4) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened in unbanked rural centres (urcs), as defined in paragraph 4(4) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be counted and added to the denominator as well as numerator on pro rata basis for computing the requirement as well as the compliance with the norm o
controls.control_description:
(2) A part-time banking outlet, opened in any Centre, shall be counted and added
to the denominator as well as numerator on pro rata basis for computing the
requirement as well as the compliance with the norm of opening 25 percent
Banking Outlets in URCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be counted and added to the denominator as well as numerator on pro rata basis for computing the requirement as well as the compliance with the norm o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as equivalent to opening a banking outlet/ part-time banking outlet, as the case may be, in a urc
controls.control_description:
<image>
• For computation of 25% URC,
o Total outlets opened = 100+1.2 = 101.2
o Opened in URC = 30+1.2 =31.2
o URC % = 31.2/101.2*100 = 30.83% (Complies with the norm)
(3) A Banking Outlet / part-time banking outlet opened in any Tier 3 to Tier 6 centre
of North-Eastern States as well as in any Tier 3 to 6 centre of Left-wing
Extremism (LWE) affected districts as notified by the Government of India from
time to time, shall be considered as equivalent to opening a Banking Outlet/
part-time banking outlet, as the case may be, in a URC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as equivalent to opening a banking outlet/ part-time banking outlet, as the case may be, in a urc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to carry forward the benefit of the banking outlets
controls.control_description:
To encourage banks to open more number of Banking Outlets in URCs, a bank
shall be allowed to carry forward the benefit of the banking outlets, if any, opened
in excess of the requirement specified in paragraph 10 above, for a period of next
two years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to carry forward the benefit of the banking outlets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed
controls.control_description: No further extension to avail the benefit shall be allowed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed

controls.control_objective: To ensure play a constructive and proactive role
controls.control_description:
To enable a bank to have information for identifying an URC, State Level Bankers
Committees (SLBCs) shall play a constructive and proactive role.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to play a constructive and proactive role

controls.control_objective: To ensure compile and have an updated list of all urcs in the state which shall be displayed on their website
controls.control_description:
The SLBCs
shall compile and have an updated list of all URCs in the state which shall be
displayed on their website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compile and have an updated list of all urcs in the state which shall be displayed on their website

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform and coordinate with the slbc convenor bank to earmark the centre identified by it
controls.control_description:
The bank shall inform and
coordinate with the SLBC convenor bank to earmark the centre identified by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform and coordinate with the slbc convenor bank to earmark the centre identified by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate the centre as available for other banks to open a banking outlet
controls.control_description:
If
the bank fails to open the banking outlet in the prescribed period of one year as
per paragraph 11 above, the SLBC convenor bank may indicate the centre as
available for other banks to open a banking outlet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate the centre as available for other banks to open a banking outlet

controls.control_objective: To ensure shift, merge or close all banking outlets (except rural outlets and sole semi-urban outlets) at their discretion
controls.control_description:
A bank may shift, merge or close all banking outlets (except rural outlets and sole
semi-urban outlets) at their discretion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to shift, merge or close all banking outlets (except rural outlets and sole semi-urban outlets) at their discretion

controls.control_objective: To ensure require approval of the dcc / dlrc and regional office concerned of rbi
controls.control_description:
Merger, closure and shifting of any rural banking outlet as well as a sole semi
urban banking outlet shall require approval of the DCC / DLRC and Regional
Office concerned of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require approval of the dcc / dlrc and regional office concerned of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made using the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
The application to RBI shall be made using the Pravaah
portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made using the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure require such approval
controls.control_description:
Banking
Outlet manned by bank's employee) and vice versa shall not require such
approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require such approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the banking service needs at that centre continue to be met, without disruptions
controls.control_description:
While merging / closing / shifting / converting a rural or a sole semi
urban banking outlet, the bank and DCC / DLRC shall ensure that the banking
service needs at that centre continue to be met, without disruptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the banking service needs at that centre continue to be met, without disruptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that customers of the banking outlet, which is being merged / closed / shifted are informed two months in advance so as to avoid inconveni
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also ensure that customers of the banking outlet, which is being
merged / closed / shifted are informed two months in advance so as to avoid
inconvenience to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that customers of the banking outlet, which is being merged / closed / shifted are informed two months in advance so as to avoid inconveni

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that it continues to fulfil the role entrusted to these banking outlets under the government sponsored programmes and direct benefit transfer s
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall ensure that it continues to fulfil the
role entrusted to these banking outlets under the Government sponsored
programmes and Direct Benefit Transfer schemes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that it continues to fulfil the role entrusted to these banking outlets under the government sponsored programmes and direct benefit transfer s

controls.control_objective: To ensure further ensure that banking outlets are shifted within the same or to a lesser population category, i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall further ensure that banking outlets are shifted within the same or to
a lesser population category, i.e., semi urban banking outlets to semi urban or
rural centres and rural banking outlets to other rural centres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to further ensure that banking outlets are shifted within the same or to a lesser population category, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit its annual banking outlet expansion plan (aboep), with the approval of board of directors, together with the consolidated details of proposals
controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit its Annual Banking Outlet Expansion Plan (ABOEP), with the
approval of Board of Directors, together with the consolidated details of proposals
for opening of these Banking Outlets as per Proforma given in Annex I, to
Regional Office concerned of RBI using the Pravaah portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in), and to NABARD for monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit its annual banking outlet expansion plan (aboep), with the approval of board of directors, together with the consolidated details of proposals

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all the proposals conform to the guidelines contained in the above paragraphs applicable to the bank
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that all the proposals conform to the guidelines contained in
the above paragraphs applicable to the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that all the proposals conform to the guidelines contained in the above paragraphs applicable to the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted in the prescribed form vi (annex ii) in terms of rule 12 of the banking regulation (companies rules), 1949, to the concerned regional off
controls.control_description:
Individual proposals for opening
<image>
new branches at specific centres, for which prior permission is required from RBI,
shall be submitted in the prescribed Form VI (Annex II) in terms of Rule 12 of the
Banking Regulation (Companies Rules), 1949, to the concerned Regional office
of RBI (using the Pravaah portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in)) with
recommendation of NABARD for approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted in the prescribed form vi (annex ii) in terms of rule 12 of the banking regulation (companies rules), 1949, to the concerned regional off

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the approval of the board of directors of the bank
controls.control_description:
The ABOEP and any other proposal
required to be submitted to RBI in this regard shall have the approval of the Board
of Directors of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the approval of the board of directors of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an authenticated / certified copy of such approval is invariably submitted along with these proposals
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that an authenticated / certified
copy of such approval is invariably submitted along with these proposals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an authenticated / certified copy of such approval is invariably submitted along with these proposals

controls.control_objective: To ensure visit the places proposed to be served by it on specific days / hours
controls.control_description:
The mobile unit shall visit the places
proposed to be served by it on specific days / hours.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to visit the places proposed to be served by it on specific days / hours

controls.control_objective: To ensure be attached to a branch of the bank
controls.control_description:
The mobile offices shall be
attached to a branch of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be attached to a branch of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as 'banking outlets'
controls.control_description:
These mobile
branches shall not be considered as 'Banking Outlets'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as 'banking outlets'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to open one regional office (ro) for every 50 banking outlets
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be allowed to open one Regional Office (RO) for every 50 banking
outlets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to open one regional office (ro) for every 50 banking outlets

controls.control_objective: To ensure to obtain licence from the concerned regional office of rbi prior to functioning / opening of these offices
controls.control_description:
However, the RRB is required to obtain licence from the concerned
Regional Office of RBI prior to functioning / opening of these offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to obtain licence from the concerned regional office of rbi prior to functioning / opening of these offices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under the direct control of the head office, without any intermediate tier
controls.control_description:
The bank
having up to 50 banking outlets shall be under the direct control of the Head
Office, without any intermediate tier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under the direct control of the head office, without any intermediate tier

controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined by the <image> empowered committee (ec) and referred to central office, department of regulation (dor) for consideration
controls.control_description:
The cases of the bank, which require
relaxation in the above norm with regard to the number of branches to be covered
by one RO due to geographical / other conditions, shall be examined by the
<image>
Empowered Committee (EC) and referred to Central Office, Department of
Regulation (DoR) for consideration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined by the <image> empowered committee (ec) and referred to central office, department of regulation (dor) for consideration

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to transact any banking business
controls.control_description: The RO shall not be permitted to transact any banking business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to transact any banking business

controls.control_objective: To ensure to inform the change in address to the concerned regional office of rbi at the earliest, but not later than one month from the date of shifting
controls.control_description:
The bank can
either shift or close / merge these offices at their discretion without prior approval
of RBI but are required to inform the change in address to the concerned Regional
Office of RBI at the earliest, but not later than one month from the date of shifting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to inform the change in address to the concerned regional office of rbi at the earliest, but not later than one month from the date of shifting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be communicated to the concerned regional office of rbi for cancellation immediately after the closure / merger of the office under advice to the dsim
controls.control_description:
As regards closure / merger of such offices, the same may be communicated to
the concerned Regional Office of RBI for cancellation immediately after the
closure / merger of the office under advice to the DSIM of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be communicated to the concerned regional office of rbi for cancellation immediately after the closure / merger of the office under advice to the dsim

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up training centres, back offices (central processing centres (cpcs) / service branches), treasury branches and call centres, etc
controls.control_description:
A bank may set up Training Centres, Back Offices (Central Processing Centres
(CPCs) / Service Branches), Treasury Branches and Call Centres, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up training centres, back offices (central processing centres (cpcs) / service branches), treasury branches and call centres, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any interface with customers and shall not be allowed to be converted into general banking branches
controls.control_description:
The bank shall not have any interface with customers
and shall not be allowed to be converted into general banking branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any interface with customers and shall not be allowed to be converted into general banking branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that administrative offices/controlling office, training centres, back offices i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that administrative offices/controlling office, training centres,
back offices i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that administrative offices/controlling office, training centres, back offices i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any direct interface with customers for them to be not considered as banking outlets
controls.control_description:
on
requests received from other banking outlets shall not have any direct interface
with customers for them to be not considered as banking outlets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any direct interface with customers for them to be not considered as banking outlets

controls.control_objective: To ensure to put in place the infrastructure for the branch / offices etc
controls.control_description:
An RRB is required to put in place the
infrastructure for the branch / offices etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to put in place the infrastructure for the branch / offices etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be intimated of the change
controls.control_description:
The concerned Regional
Office of RBI and DSIM, Mumbai may only be intimated of the change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be intimated of the change

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take place due to change in name of taluk / district or reorganisation of districts or formation of new states
controls.control_description:
Changes
may also take place due to change in name of taluk / district or reorganisation of
districts or formation of new States.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take place due to change in name of taluk / district or reorganisation of districts or formation of new states

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the changed name on the basis of government notification, under advice to the concerned regional office of rbi and dsim, mumbai
controls.control_description:
Under such circumstances, too, an RRB need
not forward the relevant licence/s to the Regional Office for amendment and may
adopt the changed name on the basis of Government Notification, under advice
to the concerned Regional Office of RBI and DSIM, Mumbai.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the changed name on the basis of government notification, under advice to the concerned regional office of rbi and dsim, mumbai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be addressed to the concerned regional office of rbi and while forwarding such requests, the relative licences, together with the covering letters, sh
controls.control_description:
In case an alteration in any name is to be made for avoiding confusion between
branches of various banks bearing the same name in the same locality or on
account of other justifiable circumstances, such requests shall be addressed to
the concerned Regional Office of RBI and while forwarding such requests, the
relative licences, together with the covering letters, shall also be sent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be addressed to the concerned regional office of rbi and while forwarding such requests, the relative licences, together with the covering letters, sh

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its banking outlets are not functioning from premises unauthorised in law
controls.control_description:
A bank shall
ensure that its Banking Outlets are not functioning from premises unauthorised
in law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its banking outlets are not functioning from premises unauthorised in law

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the legitimate grievances of owners of property leased to the bank are examined at appropriately senior level in the bank and expeditious
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall ensure that the legitimate grievances of owners of
property leased to the bank are examined at appropriately senior level in the bank
and expeditious action taken to redress such grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the legitimate grievances of owners of property leased to the bank are examined at appropriately senior level in the bank and expeditious

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the location of the banking outlet complies with the local norms / laws of municipal corporation / nagar palika / town area authority / vi
controls.control_description:
While acquiring premises for opening of a Banking Outlet, a bank shall ensure
that the location of the Banking Outlet complies with the local norms / laws of
Municipal Corporation / Nagar Palika / Town area authority / Village Panchayat
or any other competent authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the location of the banking outlet complies with the local norms / laws of municipal corporation / nagar palika / town area authority / vi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as 'banking outlets' as defined in paragraph 4(3) above
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Such CDMs / BNAMs shall not be reckoned as 'Banking Outlets'
as defined in paragraph 4(3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as 'banking outlets' as defined in paragraph 4(3) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as 'banking outlets' as defined in paragraph 4(3) above
controls.control_description:
<image>
Such ATMs shall not be reckoned as 'Banking Outlets' as defined in paragraph
4(3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as 'banking outlets' as defined in paragraph 4(3) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded in the books of the respective branch/ base branch / centralised data centre
controls.control_description:
The business transacted at the Off-site ATM shall be recorded in the books of the
respective branch/ base branch / Centralised Data Centre.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded in the books of the respective branch/ base branch / centralised data centre

controls.control_objective: To ensure make adequate stand-by arrangements for meeting the cash requirements of the atm
controls.control_description:
The bank shall make adequate stand-by arrangements for meeting the cash
requirements of the ATM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make adequate stand-by arrangements for meeting the cash requirements of the atm

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that only properly sorted and examined notes are put into circulation through the atm
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that only properly sorted and examined notes are put into
circulation through the ATM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that only properly sorted and examined notes are put into circulation through the atm

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal in indian rupee (₹) only
controls.control_description: The ATMs installed in SEZs shall deal in Indian Rupee (₹) only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal in indian rupee (₹) only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be installed at any place identified by the bank with adequate security arrangements
controls.control_description:
A Bank is permitted to install CDMs / BNAMs at centres / places identified by it
without having the need to take permission from RBI in each case, subject to
following conditions:
(1) CDMs / BNAMs may be installed at any place identified by the bank with
adequate security arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be installed at any place identified by the bank with adequate security arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure return any note which is suspect / counterfeit to the customer
controls.control_description:
(2) CDMs / BNAMs shall not return any note which is suspect / counterfeit to the
customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to return any note which is suspect / counterfeit to the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to enable reporting of counterfeit notes detected
controls.control_description:
(3) An audit trail of transactions shall be available to enable reporting of
counterfeit notes detected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available to enable reporting of counterfeit notes detected

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the services of intermediaries such as: (1) ngos / shgs (2) farmers clubs (3) cooperatives (4) community based organisations (5) it enabled rural
controls.control_description:
Under the 'Business Facilitator' model, a bank may use the services of
intermediaries such as:
(1) NGOs / SHGs
(2) Farmers Clubs
(3) Cooperatives
(4) Community based organisations
(5) IT enabled rural outlets of corporate entities
(6) Post Offices
(7) Insurance agents
(8) Well functioning Panchayats
(9) Village Knowledge Centres
(10) Agri Clinics
(11) Agri Business Centres
(12) Krishi Vigyan Kendras
(13) Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC) / Khadi and Village
Industries Board (KVIB) units.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the services of intermediaries such as: (1) ngos / shgs (2) farmers clubs (3) cooperatives (4) community based organisations (5) it enabled rural

controls.control_objective: To ensure include (i) identification of borrowers and fitment of activities
controls.control_description:
Depending on the comfort level of a bank for providing facilitation services, such
services may include (i) identification of borrowers and fitment of activities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include (i) identification of borrowers and fitment of activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage business correspondents (bcs)
controls.control_description:
A scheduled bank may engage Business Correspondents (BCs), subject to
compliance with the guidelines contained in this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage business correspondents (bcs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out on the individuals / entities to be engaged as bcs prior to their engagement
controls.control_description:
Due diligence shall be carried out on the individuals / entities to be engaged as
BCs prior to their engagement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out on the individuals / entities to be engaged as bcs prior to their engagement

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover aspects such as (i) reputation / market standing, (ii) financial soundness, (iii) management and corporate governance, (iv) cash h
controls.control_description:
The due diligence exercise may, inter alia, cover
aspects such as (i) reputation / market standing, (ii) financial soundness, (iii)
management and corporate governance, (iv) cash handling ability and (v) ability
to implement technology solutions in rendering financial services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, cover aspects such as (i) reputation / market standing, (ii) financial soundness, (iii) management and corporate governance, (iv) cash h

controls.control_objective: To ensure be attached to and be under the oversight of a specific banking outlet manned by bank's employee designated as the base banking outlet
controls.control_description:
Every retail outlet / sub-agent of BC shall be attached to and be under the
oversight of a specific Banking Outlet manned by bank's employee designated
as the base Banking Outlet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be attached to and be under the oversight of a specific banking outlet manned by bank's employee designated as the base banking outlet

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage the following individuals / entities as bcs: (1) individuals like retired bank employees, retired teachers, retired government employees and ex
controls.control_description:
A bank may engage the following individuals / entities as BCs:
(1) Individuals like retired bank employees, retired teachers, retired government
employees and ex-servicemen, individual owners of kirana / medical / Fair Price
shops, individual Public Call Office (PCO) operators, agents of Small Savings
schemes of Government of India / Insurance Companies, individuals who own
Petrol Pumps, authorised functionaries of well-run Self Help Groups (SHGs)
which are linked to banks, any other individual including those operating
Common Service Centres (CSCs);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage the following individuals / entities as bcs: (1) individuals like retired bank employees, retired teachers, retired government employees and ex

controls.control_objective: To ensure be engaged as bcs
controls.control_description:
(7) Non-deposit taking NBFCs (NBFCs-ND) may be engaged as BCs, subject to
the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be engaged as bcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that there is no comingling of bank funds and those of the nbfc-nd appointed as bc
controls.control_description:
(i) It shall be ensured that there is no comingling of bank funds and those of
the NBFC-ND appointed as BC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that there is no comingling of bank funds and those of the nbfc-nd appointed as bc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a specific contractual arrangement between the bank and the nbfc-nd to ensure that all possible conflicts of interest are adequately taken care of
controls.control_description:
(ii) There shall be a specific contractual arrangement between the bank and
the NBFC-ND to ensure that all possible conflicts of interest are adequately
taken care of.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a specific contractual arrangement between the bank and the nbfc-nd to ensure that all possible conflicts of interest are adequately taken care of

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the nbfc-nd does not adopt any restrictive practice such as offering savings or remittance functions only to its own customers and forced
controls.control_description:
(iii) The bank shall ensure that the NBFC-ND does not adopt any restrictive
practice such as offering savings or remittance functions only to its own
customers and forced bundling of services offered by the NBFC-ND and
the bank does not take place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the nbfc-nd does not adopt any restrictive practice such as offering savings or remittance functions only to its own customers and forced

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(iv) The bank shall also be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Regional
Rural Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent the bank which has appointed the bc
controls.control_description:
While a BC can be a BC for more than one bank, at the point of customer
interface, a retail outlet or a sub-agent of a BC shall represent the bank which
has appointed the BC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent the bank which has appointed the bc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carefully defined in written agreements and subjected to a thorough legal vetting
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions governing the contract between the bank and a BC
shall be carefully defined in written agreements and subjected to a thorough legal
vetting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carefully defined in written agreements and subjected to a thorough legal vetting

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - managing risks in outsourcing), directions 2025
controls.control_description:
While drawing up agreements, the bank shall strictly adhere to
instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing), Directions 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly adhere to instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - managing risks in outsourcing), directions 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully responsible for the actions of the bcs and their retail outlets / sub agents
controls.control_description:
The bank shall be fully
responsible for the actions of the BCs and their retail outlets / sub agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully responsible for the actions of the bcs and their retail outlets / sub agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the normal course of banking business
controls.control_description:
The activities to be undertaken by the BCs shall be within the normal course of
banking business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the normal course of banking business

controls.control_objective: To ensure include (i) identification of borrowers
controls.control_description:
The scope of activities of a BC may include (i) identification of
borrowers;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include (i) identification of borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in all cases
controls.control_description:
KYC and AML procedures, as laid down in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional
Rural Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be followed in all
cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in all cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be used for updation / periodic updation of kyc
controls.control_description: BCs may also be used for Updation / Periodic Updation of KYC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be used for updation / periodic updation of kyc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure the preservation and protection of the security and confidentiality of customer information in the custody or possession of bc
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure the preservation and protection of the security and
confidentiality of customer information in the custody or possession of BC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure the preservation and protection of the security and confidentiality of customer information in the custody or possession of bc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that equipment and technology used by the bc are of high standards
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that equipment and technology used by the BC are of high
standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that equipment and technology used by the bc are of high standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily not exceed 30 kms in rural, semi-urban and urban areas and 5 kms in metropolitan centres
controls.control_description:
The distance between the place of business of a retail outlet / sub-agent of BC
and the base Banking Outlet (manned by bank's employee) shall ordinarily not
exceed 30 kms in rural, semi-urban and urban areas and 5 kms in metropolitan
centres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily not exceed 30 kms in rural, semi-urban and urban areas and 5 kms in metropolitan centres

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, while formulating the board approved policy for engaging bcs, keep in mind the objectives of adequate oversight of the bcs as well as provi
controls.control_description:
The bank shall, however, while
formulating the Board approved policy for engaging BCs, keep in mind the
objectives of adequate oversight of the BCs as well as provision of services to
customers while deciding how to modify extant distance criteria.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , however, while formulating the board approved policy for engaging bcs, keep in mind the objectives of adequate oversight of the bcs as well as provi

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay reasonable commission / fee to the bc, the rate and quantum of which may be reviewed periodically
controls.control_description:
A bank shall pay reasonable commission / fee to the BC, the rate and quantum
of which may be reviewed periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay reasonable commission / fee to the bc, the rate and quantum of which may be reviewed periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically prohibit them from charging any fee to the customers directly for services rendered by them on behalf of the bank
controls.control_description:
The agreement with the BC shall
specifically prohibit them from charging any fee to the customers directly for
services rendered by them on behalf of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically prohibit them from charging any fee to the customers directly for services rendered by them on behalf of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be devised in a manner that mere increase in the number of clients served or the transaction volume does not drive the commission
controls.control_description:
Commission structure or
incentive mechanism shall be devised in a manner that mere increase in the
number of clients served or the transaction volume does not drive the
commission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be devised in a manner that mere increase in the number of clients served or the transaction volume does not drive the commission

controls.control_objective: To ensure combine fixed and variable parts dependent, inter-alia, on some indication or measure of customer satisfaction
controls.control_description:
The remuneration shall combine fixed and variable parts dependent,
inter-alia, on some indication or measure of customer satisfaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to combine fixed and variable parts dependent, inter-alia, on some indication or measure of customer satisfaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given by banks to those risks
controls.control_description:
As engagement of intermediaries such as Business Facilitators / Correspondents
involves significant reputational, legal and operational risks, due consideration
shall be given by banks to those risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given by banks to those risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt technology-based solutions for managing the risk, besides increasing the outreach in a cost effective manner
controls.control_description:
The bank shall adopt technology-based
solutions for managing the risk, besides increasing the outreach in a cost effective
manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt technology-based solutions for managing the risk, besides increasing the outreach in a cost effective manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally be put through ict devices (handheld device / mobile phone) that are seamlessly integrated to the core banking solution (cbs) of the bank
controls.control_description:
The transactions shall normally be put through ICT devices (handheld
device / mobile phone) that are seamlessly integrated to the Core Banking
Solution (CBS) of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally be put through ict devices (handheld device / mobile phone) that are seamlessly integrated to the core banking solution (cbs) of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accounted for on a real time basis and the customers shall receive immediate verification of their transactions through visuals (screen based) or o
controls.control_description:
The transactions shall be accounted for on a real time
basis and the customers shall receive immediate verification of their transactions
through visuals (screen based) or other means (debit or credit slip).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accounted for on a real time basis and the customers shall receive immediate verification of their transactions through visuals (screen based) or o

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, be guided by the recommendations made in chapter iii of the khan group report as also the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - mana
controls.control_description:
In formulating their schemes on BC, the bank shall, inter alia, be guided by the
recommendations made in Chapter III of the Khan Group Report as also the
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing),
Directions 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , inter alia, be guided by the recommendations made in chapter iii of the khan group report as also the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - mana

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify: (1) suitable limits on cash holding by intermediaries as also limits on individual customer payments and receipts
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify: (1) suitable limits on cash holding by intermediaries as also limits on individual customer payments and receipts

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest with the bank
controls.control_description:
(5) As the cash handled by BCs is the bank's cash, the responsibility for insuring
this cash shall rest with the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest with the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out a detailed review of the performance of various bcs engaged by it at least once in a year and it shall monitor the activities of bcs through
controls.control_description:
A bank shall carry out a detailed review of the performance of various BCs
engaged by it at least once in a year and it shall monitor the activities of BCs
through its Controlling Offices and also through various fora under Lead Bank
<image>
Scheme i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out a detailed review of the performance of various bcs engaged by it at least once in a year and it shall monitor the activities of bcs through

controls.control_objective: To ensure include visit to bcs and interface with customers at periodical intervals
controls.control_description:
The internal control mechanism in the bank
shall include visit to BCs and interface with customers at periodical intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include visit to bcs and interface with customers at periodical intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the operations of bcs at least once every six months with a view to ensuring that requirement of prefunding of corporate bcs and bc agents shou
controls.control_description:
The
Board shall review the operations of BCs at least once every six months with a
view to ensuring that requirement of prefunding of Corporate BCs and BC Agents
should progressively taper down with the passage of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the operations of bcs at least once every six months with a view to ensuring that requirement of prefunding of corporate bcs and bc agents shou

controls.control_objective: To ensure progressively come down in such a manner so as to reach around 15% of the limits fixed for each bc / csp in case of deposits and 30% in case of bank g
controls.control_description:
Ideally in all normal
cases, the prefunding shall progressively come down in such a manner so as to
reach around 15% of the limits fixed for each BC / CSP in case of deposits and
30% in case of Bank Guarantees, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to progressively come down in such a manner so as to reach around 15% of the limits fixed for each bc / csp in case of deposits and 30% in case of bank g

controls.control_objective: To ensure take all measures to protect the interests of the customers
controls.control_description: A bank shall take all measures to protect the interests of the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take all measures to protect the interests of the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be personally introduced to the members of public by the bank officials in the presence of village elders and government functionaries in a public mee
controls.control_description:
Some
such safeguards are outlined below:
(1) The retail outlet / sub-agent of the BC shall be personally introduced to the
members of public by the bank officials in the presence of village elders and
government functionaries in a public meeting so that there is no
misrepresentation/impersonation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be personally introduced to the members of public by the bank officials in the presence of village elders and government functionaries in a public mee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the bank and the bc shall not introduce any product / process without the approval of the bank
controls.control_description:
(2) The products and processes shall be approved by the bank and the BC shall
not introduce any product / process without the approval of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the bank and the bc shall not introduce any product / process without the approval of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure post a sign in local language (vernacular) indicating their status as service providers for the bank as also disclose the name of the bc, the telephon
controls.control_description:
(3) Each retail outlet / sub-agent shall post a sign in local language (vernacular)
indicating their status as service providers for the bank as also disclose the
name of the BC, the telephone number, email id of the base Banking
Outlet/controlling office of the bank and the Banking Ombudsman and the fees
for all services available at the outlet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to post a sign in local language (vernacular) indicating their status as service providers for the bank as also disclose the name of the bc, the telephon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tied to the sale of any product of such company
controls.control_description:
(4) Financial services offered by the retail outlets / sub-agents of the BC shall not
be tied to the sale of any product of such company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tied to the sale of any product of such company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated in a brochure and made available at the retail outlets / with the sub-agents
controls.control_description:
(5) The charges for offering various services shall be indicated in a brochure and
made available at the retail outlets / with the sub-agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated in a brochure and made available at the retail outlets / with the sub-agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop suitable training modules in the local language(s) in order to provide proper attitudinal orientation and skills to the bcs / sub-agents
controls.control_description:
(6) The bank shall develop suitable training modules in the local language(s) in
order to provide proper attitudinal orientation and skills to the BCs / sub-agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop suitable training modules in the local language(s) in order to provide proper attitudinal orientation and skills to the bcs / sub-agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure have necessary business continuity plan (bcp) in place to ensure uninterrupted service in case the agency arrangement with the bcs / subagents is term
controls.control_description:
(8) The bank shall have necessary Business Continuity Plan (BCP) in place to
ensure uninterrupted service in case the agency arrangement with the BCs /
subagents is terminated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have necessary business continuity plan (bcp) in place to ensure uninterrupted service in case the agency arrangement with the bcs / subagents is term

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the customer database and account details are kept separate and there is no co-mingling of data
controls.control_description:
(9) In case a company is engaged as BC by more than one bank, it shall be
ensured that the customer database and account details are kept separate and
there is no co-mingling of data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the customer database and account details are kept separate and there is no co-mingling of data

controls.control_objective: To ensure be constituted within the bank for redressing complaints about services rendered by the bcs and be given wide publicity through electronic and print m
controls.control_description:
Grievance Redressal Machinery shall be constituted within the bank for
redressing complaints about services rendered by the BCs and be given wide
publicity through electronic and print media.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be constituted within the bank for redressing complaints about services rendered by the bcs and be given wide publicity through electronic and print m

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be made known and widely publicised
controls.control_description:
The name and contact number of
designated Grievance Redressal Officer of the bank shall also be made known
and widely publicised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be made known and widely publicised

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that grievances of customers are redressed promptly
controls.control_description:
The designated officer shall ensure that grievances of
customers are redressed promptly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that grievances of customers are redressed promptly

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed on the bank's website
controls.control_description:
The grievance redressal procedure of the
bank and the time frame fixed for responding to the complaints shall be placed
on the bank's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed on the bank's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure scale up its efforts substantially towards educating its clientele in their respective vernacular languages regarding the benefits of banking habit
controls.control_description:
Since, financial literacy and customer education forms an important part of the
business strategy and the commitment by a bank adopting the BC model, the
bank may scale up its efforts substantially towards educating its clientele in their
respective vernacular languages regarding the benefits of banking habit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to scale up its efforts substantially towards educating its clientele in their respective vernacular languages regarding the benefits of banking habit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed on the banks' website
controls.control_description:
Information regarding BCs engaged by the bank may be placed on the banks'
website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed on the banks' website

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include the progress in respect <image> of extending banking services through the bc model and the initiatives taken by the bank in this regard
controls.control_description:
The Annual Report of the bank shall also include the progress in respect
<image>
of extending banking services through the BC model and the initiatives taken by
the bank in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include the progress in respect <image> of extending banking services through the bc model and the initiatives taken by the bank in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure also use print and electronic media (including in the vernacular language) to give wide publicity about implementation of the bc model
controls.control_description:
The bank may also use print and electronic media
(including in the vernacular language) to give wide publicity about implementation
of the BC model.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also use print and electronic media (including in the vernacular language) to give wide publicity about implementation of the bc model

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide information in a single proforma (annex iii) online on central information system for banking infrastructure (cisbi) portal (https://cisbi
controls.control_description:
A bank shall provide information in a single Proforma (Annex III) online on
Central Information System for Banking Infrastructure (CISBI) portal
(https://cisbi.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide information in a single proforma (annex iii) online on central information system for banking infrastructure (cisbi) portal (https://cisbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit information on cisbi portal as per guidelines given in the annex v and thereafter bank / bos / bank branch / office / naio / other fixed csps i
controls.control_description:
Banks shall submit information on CISBI portal as per
guidelines given in the Annex V and thereafter bank / BOs / bank branch / office
/ NAIO / other fixed CSPs i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to submit information on cisbi portal as per guidelines given in the annex v and thereafter bank / bos / bank branch / office / naio / other fixed csps i

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a monthly report through cisbi that its information in cisbi is correct and updated
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a monthly report through cisbi that its information in cisbi is correct and updated

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit immediately and in any case not later than one week, the information relating to opening, closure, merger, shifting and conversion of bos / ban
controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit immediately and in any case not later than one week, the
information relating to opening, closure, merger, shifting and conversion of Bos /
bank branches / Offices / ATMs / NAIO, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit immediately and in any case not later than one week, the information relating to opening, closure, merger, shifting and conversion of bos / ban

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
<image>
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted in cisbi
controls.control_description:
Under the new system, information related to Bank, Banking Outlet [Brick & Mortar
(B&M) Branch and Fixed-Point Business Correspondent (BC) Outlet], Office, NAIOs,
other fixed Customer Service Points (CSPs) (e.g., ATMs, Other Customer Services)
must be submitted in CISBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted in cisbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide an authorised email id on which rbi (dsim-bbsd) can forward 'bank admin id' and its password in two different emails
controls.control_description:
For getting 'Bank Admin ID', a bank should
provide an authorised email ID on which RBI (DSIM-BBSD) can forward 'Bank Admin
ID' and its password in two different emails.

controls.control_objective: To ensure contact rbi (dsim-bbsd) for this purpose
controls.control_description:
A new bank seeking reporting access to
CISBI, should contact RBI (DSIM-BBSD) for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contact rbi (dsim-bbsd) for this purpose

channels, then generate 'Nil Report' and submit it through CISBI only (No hard copy is
required).
